feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Apps
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Apps Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Unable to perform POST from SAP Build Apps.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing error while performing  a POST request form SAP build apps to SAP Hana DB. The service was created using a CAPM project in SAP BTP.

Service works correctly using a postman. GET, POST, PATCH is working.

 

Below is  error "msg":"400 > /n code: '400",In message: 'Property I"@odata.type\" does not exist in Asp•••••••••••••.Asp●●●●●●●●"In)","type":"log"]

 

However, not from build apps.

entry.title: in my recently developed apps on sap build apps,I am having to refresh page to view effect.help?
entry.content: in my recently developed apps on sap build apps,I am having to refresh page to view effect.help?Every time I am upadating a field  in navigated page then I will have to comeback to main page to view it.It is supposed to show data automaticatically but I am having to refresh the page here. Need help..Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Can I create a JDBC Connection Destination (HANA GCP DB) in BTP?
entry.content:
I'd like to be able to create an SAP Build Apps application that interacts with an Incentive Management HANA DB in GCP.  The connection in Advanced Workflow is a JDBC connection and I have the credentials for it.

Is it possible to create a Destination in BTP for that connection? There doesn't seem to be a JDBC "connection type" available.

Thanks in advance!

Regards,

Ron

entry.title: Can I still deploy a SAP Build Apps project from the launch window?
entry.content:
Since the last Build Apps UI update I can't deploy a project from the Build Tab anymore. Previously I pressed "Build" then chose if it should be a ZIP or a MTA, and also had the ability to deploy it from there, that was nice. Now I just chose Workzone and it Builds my project and I can download it but cant deploy it from Build Apps deploy Tab anymore or can I? How do I now do the deployment anyway, do I manually have to upload it to the Workzone?

Thanks for your help 🙂

entry.title: CORS (Cross-Origin Resource Sharing) Error in SAP Build Apps - OData API Call
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm experiencing a CORS (Cross-Origin Resource Sharing) error while calling an OData API from SAP Build Apps. Despite configuring the API and app settings, I continue to encounter this issue on Web-browser.
 
Error Details:
  • Error Message: 
  • Product: SAP Build Apps 
  • OData API Version: V2.0
  • Browser/Platform: Mozilla/5.0
Steps Taken:
  • Verified API and app credentials
  • Tested API calls using tools like Postman (successful)
  • Configuring proxy settings in SAP Build
  • Adding CORS headers manually in the API requests
  • Using CORS-enabled libraries
Question:
Can anyone provide guidance on resolving this CORS error in SAP Build Apps? Are there specific settings or configurations I'm missing? Specifically:
  • How to configure SAP Build to handle CORS requests?
  • Best practices for handling CORS in SAP Build apps?
  • Any known workarounds or third-party libraries that can help resolve this issue?
Thank you for your assistance.
 
Best regards,
Aman K.

entry.title: Configure universal REST API integration SAP BUID APPS
entry.content: I'm not able to configure the new API model "Configure universal REST API integration" is anyone not using this model?

entry.title: How Can I Connect a PostgreSQL Instance to SAP Build Apps?
entry.content: I’m developing an app using SAP Build Apps and want to use PostgreSQL as my backend database. I understand SAP Build Apps supports REST API integration, but I’m unsure how to expose my PostgreSQL instance and link it to the app.

entry.title: SAP Build App -BTP Connection to "XXX" established. Response returned: "401: Unauthorized"
entry.content:
I did this very nice video " Access Demo SAP APIs for SAP Build" (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=11TUQgQi-9k) to create an app using a Business Partner sandbox API and worked fine.  I could see the data when lauching the web app. Really nice indeed!

 

But one day after I could no longer see the data when oppening web preview.

In the Build App, in the data section, I can see my integration (BTP destination), install it,  enable entities and when executing "browse real data" it works perfectly.

But when I make a binding with a data variable, and launch the web app, the data no longer appears.

One point is that, within the BTP, when I try to test the destination (check connection), the system returns a message of :  Connection to "demoApp_BP" established. Response returned: "401: Unauthorized"

I have already cleared the browser cache, reinstalled the Build App, deleted and created a new subaccount in the BTP, but none of this worked. 

OBS:  I put all the role colections on my btp user ( Custom IAS tenant and Default identity provider  users) and i m loggin in SAP Business Accelerator Hub

Could someone please help me?

I really can't see what is different from a day ago when the data was returned ok.

Thanks.

 

Here some of the app

when oppening web preview = no data

entry.title: How we connect SAP Build Apps with PostgreSQL.
entry.content: I am created an application with SAP Build App. But, I don't know how to connect SAP Build App with PostgreSQL.

entry.title: Error in SAP Build apps Build service 4.11.167
entry.content:
I suddenly get an error when trying to make a web build in SAP Build apps. I then tried to Build an older app that I havent touched since I created it and it gives the same error message. I cant make any Build at the moment. I am using the Community edition. I have searched the forum and found others getting the same error message but not any solutions except not making copies of an app but instead saving them as new projects. I cant see that I have that option in the Community edition.Tried to make a build with an app that I know is not copied but it does not work either. Please help! Thanks!

 

AB version: 2.13.4
COMMAND: 

NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=12240 NEXT_SUPPORT_RELATIVE_PATHS=true USER_METERING_ENABLED=true SHOW_SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION=false SUBSCRIPTION_VERIFICATION_NOTIFICATION_DISMISSIBLE=true  npxrnv export -p web -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.11.167 -r 

FAILED with ERROR: 

Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv export -p web -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.11.167 -r

entry.title: Hello Experts, How is a logout implemented in SAP Build Apps?
entry.content:
How is a logout implemented in SAP Build Apps? Is it necessary to implement an HTML5 or CAP application to achieve this?

Thanks a lot

entry.title: Why is a SAP Build APPS app 10 times faster on an Android device then on a web server?
entry.content: I have built and app and tested it both on a webbserver and as an app on an Android device. When I run it on the tablet it is approx 10 times faster then when I run the app on the webbserver. I tested it on the local webbserver. It is also slow when I launch the app in the preview mode in SAP Build apps. Does anyone know if I can do something to fix this? Thanks?

entry.title: How can i use OCR within SAP Build App?
entry.content:
Hello experts, 

I want to use the OCR functionality in a Build App.
The main idea of ​​the app would be for a field technician to use this Build App (with offline option) to photograph a serial number on an equipment. When saving the photo, I would like the OCR (or similar service) to identify this number (ID), save it in a variable, and trigger the creation of a SAP maintenance notification (e.g.: Maintenance Notification API), with the value of the variable being passed to the description of the created notification. In other words, the description of the created notification must be the same as the serial number photographed in the field.

Could anyone help me? 

Some steps and guidance would be very nice. 

Best regards.

entry.title: Problem with request body mapper and how to write the code
entry.content:
Hi,

I built and app and it works perfect on webb and in the beginning also on an Android tablet. Suddenly the functions that made calls to oData API stopped working on all tablets at the same time. I have not been able to solve this so now I decided to change the data sources to REST api instead since they have worked perfect. Problem is that when I for example wants to make a call and GET records sending conditions I cant seem to write the correct code in the request body mapper. I get all records evry time when i test. For example a simple call with just one filter condition like this:

ENCODE_JSON({ "conditions": [ { "field": "U_DocEntry", "operator": "=", "value": 478 } ]}) OR

ENCODE_JSON({"U_DocEntry":478})

I make calls to SAP Business one service layer and in this case it is a UDT(own table). Can someone please tell me what I am doing wrong? Thanks!

entry.title: SAP Build Apps - Visual Cloud Functions - "RBAC: access denied" on retrive, create
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created a Visual cloud function project in SAP Build Apps and created an entity. When I tried to retrieve the entity via Browse Data  or add a row manually via Browse Data I get the below error.

 

 

The role and user configuration looks ok to me. Tried deleting and reconfiguring the roles but did not help.

I made sure the App is deployed after changing the roles.

I am using the same email id to login. 

 

 

Any pointers on this is highly appreciated.
@Dan_Wroblewski @JoeBinkley @beapasch

entry.title: Combining Data from Multiple APIs in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hi amazing SAP enthusiasts!

I hope you’re all having a great day! I’m diving into a project using SAP Build Apps and could really use your expertise on a particular challenge I’m facing.

I’m trying to display data in a single table that pulls from two different APIs. API1 gives me two of the fields I need, while API2 provides the other two. My goal is to combine these fields into one cohesive table.

If anyone has experience with this, I’d love to hear your tips or best practices! Are there specific functions or approaches within SAP Build Apps that can help me achieve this integration smoothly

Looking forward to your insights!

entry.title: How to use deploy CAPM application link in SAP BUILD app.
entry.content: I have created a CAPM application and deployed and generate one URL. I want to know how we can use that url for SAP Build App to connect with PostgreSQL. And also getting error 401, when I want to see data in Postman with the URL.

entry.title: How to integrate SAP Datasphere Consumption API in SAP BTP Destination and SAP BTP-BPA
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am facing an issue when creating a destination on Sap data sphere Consumption API. I am getting a 401 authorization issue when creating a Destination using Oauth 2.0. However, using the same URL in Postman is working fine.

Can you suggest a solution to this issue?

This is the authorization I am using for Postman.

entry.title: How to notify multiple users?
entry.content:
Hello,

I don't know if this is even possible, but I'm trying to create an app in SAP Build Apps, and I need a button to send a notification to everyone in the user's friend group when they click the button. Bonus points if it can override silent mode and do not disturb

If this isn't possible with SAP Build Apps, could anyone recommend me another app builder that does have this function? It's a crucial part of the app I'm trying to make.

Thank you!

entry.title: Fetching UserName based on repeated item's InternalKey.
entry.content:
Hey!

I'm writing this question, because even after countless tries and workaraound attempts, I still couln't solve this issue. 

I am using ApprovalRequest1 data variable. My issue is, that I want to show the UserCode or UserName field for each approver who made a decision, but only the InternalKey of the users are present in the data. Since the text box is in repeat, I don't know how to fetch and store the data from Users endpoint for each line of the repeated data. My goal is to replace all potential repeated items' InternalKey with the matching User's UserCode or UserName.

I had troubles before working with sub-arrays, and this time too it gave me a troublesome time. Here are some images for easier understading (the on the second one we can see my best attempt so far.):
